vocab.example: 他把会议内容详细地记录了下来。
他不仅学习好，而且乐于助人。
大家都很佩服他的勇气。
政府官员来到现场视察。
这个世界充满了奇妙的事物。
警察向他询问当时的情况。
学校派他去参加朗诵比赛。
她从小就对音乐艺术很感兴趣。
听了老师的讲解，我才恍然大悟。
他不小心把墨水泼到了桌上。

sentences.text: 老天爷好像故意跟我作对似的，骤然下起了滂沱大雨。
sentences.description: It suddenly poured torrential rain as if heaven was intentionally against me.

sentences.text: 原本晴朗的天空，突然间乌云密布，雷电交加，接着大雨就倾盆而下。
sentences.description: Clear sky suddenly filled with dark clouds, thunder, lightning, and heavy downpour.

sentences.text: 雨过天晴，空中出现一道彩虹，仿佛一座七彩桥挂在天上。
sentences.description: After the rain, a rainbow appeared in the sky like a seven-colored bridge.

sentences.text: 他好像换了两条腿，跑得如风似电。
sentences.description: Ran as fast as wind and lightning as if having a new pair of legs.

sentences.text: 他胸有成竹地说：“我们一定能成功！”
sentences.description: Said with full confidence that success is guaranteed.

记录.zh: 请你准备一本笔记本，把会议上的重要内容记录下来。
记录.en: Please prepare a notebook to record down the important contents of the meeting.

记录.zh: 这部纪录片详细地记录了野生动物在自然界中的生存状态。
记录.en: This documentary detailedly records the survival status of wild animals in nature.

记录.zh: 他在这次田径运动会上打破了保持多年的学校百米跑步记录。
记录.en: He broke the school 100-meter running record held for many years at this track and field meet.

记录.zh: 历史书籍记录了人类社会千百年来发生的重大变革与发展。
记录.en: History books record the major changes and developments that occurred in human society over thousands of years.

记录.zh: 养成每天记录生活碎片的习惯，可以留住许多美好的回忆。
记录.en: Developing a habit of recording life fragments every day can preserve many wonderful memories.

不仅.zh: 他不仅学习成绩优秀，而且在体育运动方面也表现突出。
不仅.en: He is not only excellent in academic performance, but also performs prominently in sports.

不仅.zh: 读书不仅能够丰富我们的知识，还能修养我们的个人品格。
不仅.en: Reading can not only enrich our knowledge, but also cultivate our personal character.

不仅.zh: 这座新建立的公园不仅景色宜人，还配备了齐全的健身设施。
不仅.en: This newly established park is not only pleasant in scenery, but also equipped with complete fitness facilities.

不仅.zh: 保护环境不仅是政府的责任，更是我们每一个公民的义务。
不仅.en: Protecting the environment is not only the government's responsibility, but also the duty of every one of our citizens.

不仅.zh: 这部电影不仅在中国大受好评，在海外也赢得了很高的声誉。
不仅.en: This movie was not only widely praised in China, but also earned a high reputation overseas.

佩服.zh: 面对重重困难他依然坚持不懈，这种精神令人十分佩服。
佩服.en: Facing repeated difficulties he still persevered; this kind of spirit commands great admiration.

佩服.zh: 我非常佩服这位老教授渊博的知识以及严谨的学术态度。
佩服.en: I greatly admire this old professor's profound knowledge and rigorous academic attitude.

佩服.zh: 他凭着惊人的毅力克服了身体残疾，大家都对他佩服不已。
佩服.en: He overcame physical disability with amazing perseverance, and everyone admires him endlessly.

佩服.zh: 看到他在关键时刻依然能够保持沉着冷静，我打心底里佩服他。
佩服.en: Seeing that he can still remain composed and calm at critical moments, I admire him from the bottom of my heart.

佩服.zh: 同学们都很佩服小明能够用简便的方法快速解出这道数学难题。
佩服.en: Classmates all admire Xiao Ming for being able to quickly solve this difficult math problem with a simple method.

骨.zh: 医生通过拍片子检查，确认他的脚骨并没有发生骨折。
骨.en: The doctor confirmed through an X-ray check that his foot bone did not suffer a fracture.

骨.zh: 这条流浪小狗瘦得皮包骨头，看起来十分可怜令人心疼。
骨.en: This stray dog is skin and bones, looking extremely pitiful and heartbreaking.

骨.zh: 熬制很久的猪骨浓汤散发着诱人的香味，营养非常丰富。
骨.en: The pig bone broth simmered for a long time gives off an inviting aroma and is very rich in nutrition.

骨.zh: 面对外来的强权与压迫，中华民族展现出了硬骨头精神。
骨.en: In the face of foreign power and oppression, the Chinese nation demonstrated a tough-boned spirit.

骨.zh: 经过长期的体育锻炼，他的骨骼和肌肉都变得越来越结实。
骨.en: After long-term physical exercise, his bones and muscles have both become increasingly strong.

官员.zh: 政府官员深入基层社区，听取广大市民对城市发展的建议。
官员.en: Government officials went deep into grassroots communities to listen to citizens' suggestions on city development.

官员.zh: 多国高级官员出席了本次国际峰会，共同讨论全球气候变暖问题。
官员.en: Senior officials from multiple countries attended this international summit to jointly discuss global warming issues.

官员.zh: 作为一名优秀的官员，必须时刻把人民群众的利益放在第一位。
官员.en: As an outstanding official, one must always put the interests of the masses first.

官员.zh: 参观历史博物馆时，导游向大家讲解了古代官员的选拔制度。
官员.en: While visiting the history museum, the tour guide explained the selection system for ancient officials to everyone.

官员.zh: 卫生官员提醒公众要注意饮食卫生，防止秋冬季节传染病的传播。
官员.en: Health officials reminded the public to pay attention to food hygiene to prevent the spread of infectious diseases in autumn and winter.

违抗.zh: 作为一名合格的军人，绝不能在战场上违抗上级的命令。
违抗.en: As a qualified soldier, one must never disobey superior orders on the battlefield.

违抗.zh: 他因为胆敢公开违抗公司的规章制度而受到了严厉的处罚。
违抗.en: He received harsh punishment because he dared to publicly defy the company's rules and regulations.

违抗.zh: 无论面对多大的压力，我们都绝对不能违抗法律和道德的底线。
违抗.en: No matter how much pressure is faced, we must absolutely never violate the bottom lines of law and morality.

违抗.zh: 这个固执的孩子经常违抗父母的劝告，结果吃了不少亏。
违抗.en: This stubborn child often disobeys his parents' advice and ends up suffering many losses.

违抗.zh: 在古代封建社会，任何人违抗皇帝的旨意都会招致杀身之祸。
违抗.en: In ancient feudal society, anyone disobeying the emperor's decree would bring mortal danger upon themselves.

窄.zh: 这条小巷子非常狭窄，连一辆小轿车都很难开过去。
窄.en: This alley is very narrow; even a small car finds it hard to drive through.

窄.zh: 这双鞋子的码数偏小，鞋头部分对我来说显得有些太窄了。
窄.en: The size of these shoes runs small, and the toe area feels a bit too narrow for me.

窄.zh: 我们不应该拥有狭窄的见识，而要去广泛阅读开拓视野。
窄.en: We shouldn't have narrow knowledge, but rather read widely to broaden our horizons.

窄.zh: 通往山顶的石阶小路越来越窄，大家踩稳脚下小心慢行。
窄.en: The stone steps leading to the mountain peak became narrower and narrower; everyone step firmly and walk slowly with care.

窄.zh: 心胸狭窄的人很难交到真心的朋友，因为他们总是斤斤计较。
窄.en: Narrow-minded people find it hard to make genuine friends because they are always overly preoccupied with small things.

世界.zh: 随着互联网的普及，整个世界变成了一个密切联系的地球村。
世界.en: With the popularity of the Internet, the whole world has become a closely connected global village.

世界.zh: 他最大的愿望就是长大后能够环游世界，体验各地的风土人情。
世界.en: His biggest wish is to be able to travel around the world when he grows up and experience local customs everywhere.

世界.zh: 科学家的伟大发现改变了人类对物理世界的根本认知。
世界.en: The scientist's great discovery changed humanity's fundamental understanding of the physical world.

世界.zh: 每一个孩子心中都有一个充满了无限想象力与童趣的奇妙世界。
世界.en: Every child has a wonderful world full of infinite imagination and childlike innocence in their heart.

世界.zh: 我们应该共同携手维护世界和平，促进各国的合作与共同发展。
世界.en: We should join hands together to maintain world peace and promote cooperation and common development among all countries.

询问.zh: 迷路的迷茫老人在街头向热心的路人询问前往地铁站的方向。
询问.en: The confused, lost elderly person asked a warm-hearted passerby on the street for directions to the subway station.

询问.zh: 医生详细地询问了病人的症状以及近期的饮食和作息习惯。
询问.en: The doctor in detail inquired about the patient's symptoms as well as recent diet and sleep habits.

询问.zh: 警察正在对现场目击者进行详细的询问，搜集重要破案线索。
询问.en: Police officers are conducting detailed questioning of eyewitnesses at the scene to collect important crime-solving clues.

询问.zh: 如果你对这道题目有任何疑问，可以随时去办公楼询问老师。
询问.en: If you have any doubts about this question, you can go to the office building to ask the teacher at any time.

询问.zh: 顾客向售货员耐心询问这款电子产品的具体功能与售后服务。
询问.en: The customer patiently asked the salesperson about the specific functions and after-sales service of this electronic product.

派.zh: 公司决定派他前往海外分公司担任项目负责人一年。
派.en: The company decided to send him to the overseas branch office to serve as project manager for a year.

派.zh: 救援队长立刻派出了三支搜救小组前往山区搜寻失踪游客。
派.en: The rescue team leader immediately dispatched three search and rescue teams to the mountain area to search for missing tourists.

派.zh: 这种新式工具在日常家务劳动中终于派上了重要的用场。
派.en: This new style of tool finally came in handy for important use in daily housework.

派.zh: 节日里的公园里到处洋溢着一派欣欣向荣、热闹非凡的景象。
派.en: The park during the festival was everywhere bursting with a scene of thriving prosperity and extraordinary bustle.

派.zh: 老师派小明代表全班同学去台上领取这次接力比赛的奖杯。
派.en: The teacher appointed Xiao Ming to represent the whole class on stage to receive the trophy for this relay race.

艺术.zh: 绘画和音乐都是能够陶冶人的情操、表达情感的艺术形式。
艺术.en: Painting and music are both forms of art that can cultivate one's sentiments and express emotions.

艺术.zh: 这座艺术博物馆里收藏了大量来自世界各地的珍贵艺术品。
艺术.en: This art museum houses a large collection of precious artworks from around the world.

艺术.zh: 与人沟通是一门独特的艺术，需要掌握恰当的技巧与分寸。
艺术.en: Communicating with people is a unique art that requires mastering proper skills and sense of propriety.

艺术.zh: 艺术家们用精湛的技艺为观众呈现了一场无比震撼的舞台演出。
艺术.en: Artists presented an incomparably shocking stage performance for the audience with exquisite skills.

艺术.zh: 这栋建筑的设计融入了现代艺术风格，看起来非常前卫美观。
艺术.en: The design of this building incorporates modern art style, looking very futuristic and beautiful.

怀疑.zh: 没有确凿的事实依据之前，我们绝对不能盲目去怀疑别人。
怀疑.en: Before there is conclusive factual evidence, we must absolutely not blindly suspect others.

怀疑.zh: 面对这个出人意料的实验结果，科学家们提出了合理的怀疑。
怀疑.en: Faced with this unexpected experimental result, scientists raised reasonable doubts.

怀疑.zh: 他那总是支支吾吾的态度，让人忍不住对他的话产生怀疑。
怀疑.en: His attitude of always hesitating and faltering makes people unable to help doubting his words.

怀疑.zh: 警方经过缜密的侦查，最终排除了对这名嫌疑人的怀疑。
怀疑.en: After careful investigation, the police finally ruled out suspicion against this suspect.

怀疑.zh: 请相信自己的个人能力，永远不要怀疑自己努力的价值。
怀疑.en: Please believe in your own personal ability and never doubt the value of your efforts.

恍然大悟.zh: 听了老师深入浅出的讲解之后，同学们这才恍然大悟。
恍然大悟.en: After listening to the teacher's simple and profound explanation, the students suddenly realized.

恍然大悟.zh: 直到看了新闻报道的真相，大家才恍然大悟明白事情始末。
恍然大悟.en: It was not until watching the truth in news reports that everyone suddenly realized and understood the whole story.

恍然大悟.zh: 他指着地图上的标注拍了拍脑门，恍然大悟地拍手称赞。
恍然大悟.en: Pointing to the markings on the map, he patted his forehead and suddenly realized, clapping in praise.

恍然大悟.zh: 原来是他一直在背后默默地帮助我，我到今天才恍然大悟。
恍然大悟.en: So it was him silently helping me behind the scenes all along; I only suddenly realized today.

恍然大悟.zh: 经过老人的指点，迷茫的他恍然大悟，找到了人生的方向。
恍然大悟.en: After the old man's guidance, his confused self suddenly came to see the light and found the direction in life.

产生.zh: 长时间的沟通不畅容易让两个人之间产生误会和隔阂。
产生.en: Long-term poor communication easily leads to misunderstandings and estrangement between two people.

产生.zh: 这种新型发电机能够通过太阳能产生源源不断的清洁电能。
产生.en: This new type of generator can produce a steady stream of clean electric power through solar energy.

产生.zh: 读完这本感人至深的书之后，我的内心产生了强烈的共鸣。
产生.en: After reading this deeply moving book, a strong resonance arose in my heart.

产生.zh: 工业废水的随意排放会对当地生态环境产生极其严重的破坏。
产生.en: Random discharge of industrial wastewater will cause extremely serious damage to local ecological environment.

产生.zh: 在不断尝试和实践的过程中，他对科学研究产生了浓厚的兴趣。
产生.en: In the process of continuous attempts and practice, he generated a strong interest in scientific research.

墨.zh: 书法家将毛笔蘸满浓郁的墨汁，在宣纸上挥毫泼墨。
墨.en: The calligrapher dipped the brush full of thick ink and splashed ink freely on the rice paper.

墨.zh: 这幅古老的中国水墨画巧妙地展现出江南山水的美妙意境。
墨.en: This ancient Chinese ink painting skillfully demonstrates the wonderful artistic mood of Jiangnan landscapes.

墨.zh: 印表机的墨水用完了，我们需要尽快购买新的墨盒更换。
墨.en: The printer ink is used up; we need to buy new ink cartridges to replace it as soon as possible.

墨.zh: 乌贼在遇到危险时会喷出黑色的墨汁，借此迅速逃跑。
墨.en: Cuttlefish squirt black ink when encountering danger, taking advantage of it to escape quickly.

墨.zh: 房间里弥漫着一股淡淡的墨香，给人一种宁静古朴的感觉。
墨.en: A faint fragrance of ink filled the room, giving people a quiet and simple feeling.
